description:
As a user
  I want to log in to the Orange HRM system
  So that I can access the HR management features

steps.name: Given the user is on the Orange HRM login page
the user is on the Orange HRM login page
Given the user is logged in with valid credentials
the user is logged in with valid credentials
the user is on the Orange HRM login page
the user enters Admin in the username field
the user enters admin123 in the password field
the user clicks the Login button
When the user clicks on the user profile dropdown
